baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare it against a no-skill baseline or previous-version snapshot using the same prompt and inputs.

evals.prompt: Add a shared element transition from a list item to its detail page in this React app.
evals.expected_output: A ViewTransition implementation that audits the transition purpose, uses React transition triggers, and applies appropriate CSS recipes.
assertions: Audits whether the transition communicates continuity.
Uses ViewTransition rather than calling document.startViewTransition directly.
Triggers animation through startTransition, useDeferredValue, or Suspense.
Chooses shared element naming and CSS classes intentionally.
